currentRoomSensorMap.description: vacuum entity_id → current room sensor entity_id

stateSensorMap.title: state sensor mapping
stateSensorMap.description: vacuum entity_id → detailed state sensor entity_id

taskStatusSensorMap.title: task status sensor mapping
taskStatusSensorMap.description: vacuum entity_id → task status sensor entity_id

cleanedAreaSensorMap.title: cleaned area sensor mapping
cleanedAreaSensorMap.description: vacuum entity_id → cleaned area sensor entity_id (单位: m²)

cleaningTimeSensorMap.title: cleaning time sensor mapping
cleaningTimeSensorMap.description: vacuum entity_id → cleaning time sensor entity_id (单位: 分钟)

roomAreaSizes.title: room area sizes
roomAreaSizes.description: room name → area size in m²

phaseList.title: phase list
phaseList.description: phase list for task status (e.g. cleaning phases)

selectedMapEntityMap.title: selected map entity mapping
selectedMapEntityMap.description: vacuum entity_id → selected map select entity_id

fastMappingButtonMap.title: Mapeamento rápido de botões
fastMappingButtonMap.description: vacuum entity_id → Mapeamento rápido de botão entity_id

countdownTimeSeconds.title: CountdownTime Valor fixo (segundos)
countdownTimeSeconds.description: Se configurado, o CountdownTime usará um número fixo de segundos (ignorando a estimativa automática).

progressEstimatedTimeCountdown.title: Progress estimatedTime countdown
progressEstimatedTimeCountdown.description: Quando ativado, o estimatedTime fará a contagem regressiva a partir da duração configurada (usada para exibir o progresso do teste).

hepaFilterSensorMap.title: hepa filter sensor mapping
hepaFilterSensorMap.description: vacuum entity_id → hepa filter sensor entity_id

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister on shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister MatterBridge entities from Home Assistant when the plugin is disabled or MatterBridge is shut down (recommended to prevent stale entities)
